title: Stand Up and Fight
writer: James M. Cain, Jane Murfin, Harvey Fergusson
actors: Wallace Beery, Robert Taylor, Florence Rice
plot: It starts in 1844 in Maryland, where Blake Cantrell, plantation owner with slaves, is forced by debts to sell his estate and his people. Then he leaves for Cumberland, looking for a job (first time in his life), and ends up workin...
